text:
The Noggin Lugging Tortoise (キリヒトノセガメ, Kirihitonosegame) is a giant man-eating tortoise that lives in the Milsy Wetlands. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 8 

Appearance

The Noggin Lugging Tortoise resemble giant tortoises that have giant strawberries called "strawberry-men" growing on the shell of their backs. 

Behavior

This beast only moves on dense foggy days. It uses the strawberry-men that grow up like tufts on its back to fool its prey in the fog, and then attacks them. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

A couple of Noggin Lugging Tortoises lure approximately a hundred unsuspecting examinees to their strawberries so they could ambush and devour them. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The Noggin Lugging Tortoise does not have Strawberry-men growing on top of their back in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 8 (1999) 

Intertextuality

The name of the straw-man berries on the tortoise’s back might be a reference to their deceptive nature, as a strawman is also the name of a logical fallacy that involves misrepresenting an opposing argument or position as a different one easier to attack or defeat.

Translations around the World
